description: Auto-responses for simple/straightforward partner replies. Matched by campaign. No LLM cost.
simple_reply_patterns: ^\s*(yes|yeah|yea|yep|yup|ya|sure|ok|okay|k|bet|lets go|let's go|start|ready|i'm ready|im ready|do it|sign me up|how|how do i|what do i do|send them|send it)\s*[!.?]*\s*$

_default.response: Open the Shiftsmart app and on the home screen click "Get Started" on First Shift Requirements, then click "Start Module". It takes about 30 minutes and you get paid $10 for completing it. Your progress is saved so you can start now and finish later.

3.31 dxgy new DL.response: Open the Shiftsmart app and on the home screen click "Get Started" on First Shift Requirements, then click "Start Module". It takes about 30 minutes and you get paid $10 for completing it. Your progress is saved so you can start now and finish later.

3.31.26 - continue remote orientation.response: Open the Shiftsmart app and pick up where you left off — click "Get Started" on First Shift Requirements, then "Start Module". Your progress is saved. You get paid $10 when you finish.
